description: Atomic rep-facing policy units generated from currently approved FAQ articles. Raw Slack and transcript evidence is not policy authority in this file.

units.title: Main ISTV pricing and listed payment plans
units.approved_text: Main ISTV prices are Lite $12,000, Standard $20,000, and VIP/Premium $30,000. Listed payment plans are Lite: 4 x $3,000, 3 x $4,000, or 2 x $6,000; Standard: 4 x $5,000 or 2 x $10,000; VIP/Premium: 4 x $7,500, 3 x $10,000, or 2 x $15,000. Use only listed plans and current official links.
units.safe_fallback: For main ISTV, use only the current listed package prices and payment plans, and do not invent a custom split.
units.approval_reference: FAQ Bot - Recommended Answers Pack 1 review status and Magic Mike ISTV context pack reviewed by Syed

units.title: DJ/NLCEO pricing and listed payment options
units.approved_text: DJ/NLCEO prices and listed options are Lite: $10,000 PIF, $2,500 x 4, $3,600 x 3, or $5,000 x 2; Standard: $15,000 PIF, $4,000 x 4, $5,000 x 3, or $7,500 x 2; Premium VIP: $20,000 PIF, $5,000 x 4, $7,000 x 3, or $10,000 x 2; CEO Day upgrade: $5,000 PIF only. DJ/NLCEO has no same-day discount.
units.safe_fallback: For DJ/NLCEO, use only the listed DJ/NLCEO prices and payment options, and do not invent a custom split or discount.
units.approval_reference: FAQ Bot - Recommended Answers Pack 1 review status and current approved DJ/NLCEO pricing article

units.title: Main ISTV same-day discount
units.approved_text: The $2,000 same-day discount applies to main ISTV from Call 2 when the initial deposit is paid on the same calendar day as that Call 2. Payment may happen later that same calendar day after the call. Do not carry it into the next day.
units.safe_fallback: For main ISTV, the $2,000 same-day discount is tied to Call 2 and same-calendar-day initial deposit payment. It does not carry into the next day.
units.approval_reference: FAQ Bot - Recommended Answers Pack 1 review status and current approved same-day discount article

units.title: DJ/NLCEO timing and no-cohort boundary
units.approved_text: DJ/NLCEO has no cohort rule and no same-day discount. A DJ/NLCEO Call 2 may be booked out a few weeks when needed, while still preferring to move the applicant forward promptly. Do not promise a hold, custom payment date, custom split, or unlisted exception without the current DJ/NLCEO owner confirming it.
units.safe_fallback: For DJ/NLCEO, there is no cohort rule. Do not promise a hold, future payment date, custom plan, or exception; confirm any nonstandard timing with the current DJ/NLCEO owner.
units.route_reason: Confirm any nonstandard DJ/NLCEO payment timing, hold, or exception with the current DJ/NLCEO owner before promising it.
units.approval_reference: Madeline Cary Slack timing guidance reviewed 2026-07-09 and Rich/Mike cohort decision

units.title: Main ISTV payment timing and exception boundary
units.approved_text: For main ISTV, do not promise a payment hold, future payment date, custom plan, or unlisted exception. Next-cohort Call 2 exceptions require Rich/current-owner approval. Approved proof categories are a documented medical emergency or a bank block/inability to pay with bank proof; in the bank-block case the contract should still be signed.
units.safe_fallback: For main ISTV, do not promise a hold, future payment date, custom plan, or exception; route the nonstandard payment or deadline request to Rich or the current owner.
units.route_reason: Confirm any nonstandard main ISTV payment or deadline exception with Rich or the current owner before promising it.
units.approval_reference: Rich/Mike main ISTV cohort decision and current approved pricing/timing article

units.title: Pricing and payment timing product clarification
units.approved_text: Main ISTV and DJ/NLCEO have different payment-timing and cohort rules. Product scope must be known before applying either policy.
units.safe_fallback: Is this for main ISTV or DJ/NLCEO? The payment-timing and cohort rules are different, so I do not want to apply the wrong policy.
units.route_reason: Confirm the product before applying a payment-timing or cohort rule.
units.approval_reference: Current approved pricing and cohort articles

units.title: License Options and reuse-license document handling
units.approved_text: Do not use the License Options document as the default way to compare Lite and Standard. Go over the options on the call. The reuse-license document can be sent if needed, but it is not advised because it often hurts the sale.
forbidden_claims: must send the License Options document
cannot ever send the reuse license
units.safe_fallback: Go over Lite and Standard on the call instead of sending the License Options document as the default comparison. The reuse-license document can be sent if needed, but it is not advised.
units.approval_reference: Madeline Cary License Options guidance reviewed 2026-07-09

units.title: Main ISTV upgrade before filming
units.approved_text: Main ISTV clients can upgrade before filming, but not after filming. A previously received $2,000 same-day discount carries forward: discounted Standard is $18,000 and discounted VIP/Premium is $28,000. From discounted Lite at $10,000, the difference is $8,000 to Standard or $18,000 to VIP/Premium. Use the proper upgraded contract and current payment-difference route.
units.safe_fallback: For main ISTV, upgrades are allowed before filming, not after. Preserve the approved $2,000 discount when applicable and use the proper upgraded contract and current payment-difference route.
units.approval_reference: Rich Allen Slack answer supplied 2026-07-08 and current approved pricing article

units.title: DJ/NLCEO greenlight conditional-section boundary
units.approved_text: DJ/NLCEO greenlight letters do not use a cohort-based conditional-approval-expiration section. Remove that section for DJ/NLCEO. Route live letter-generation or status issues through the current greenlight process.
forbidden_claims: keep the main ISTV conditional section
units.safe_fallback: For a DJ/NLCEO greenlight letter, remove the cohort-based conditional-approval-expiration section. DJ/NLCEO does not use a cohort rule.
units.approval_reference: Madeline Cary Slack reply on DJ greenlight letters, 2026-07-09, consistent with approved no-cohort policy
